body:
If your garage door is stuck, off-track, or has a broken spring and you need immediate assistance in the Pleasanton/Tri-Valley area, several local companies offer 24/7 or same-day emergency services: [Pleasanton CA Garage Door Repair • Same-Day Service](https://mydoorteam.com/locations/california/pleasanton/?utm_source=gmb&utm_medium=location_pleasanton&utm_campaign=website#:~:text=Same%20Day%20Garage%20Door%20Repair,New%20Garage%20Door%20Installation)

### 1\. Precision Garage Door of East Bay

  * **Phone:** (925) 268-9267 [Pleasanton CA Garage Door Repair • Same-Day Service](https://mydoorteam.com/locations/california/pleasanton/?utm_source=gmb&utm_medium=location_pleasanton&utm_campaign=website#:~:text=Garage%20Maintenance,Garage%20Door%20Repair%20Specialists)

  * **Address:** 405 Boulder Court, Ste 800, Pleasanton, CA 94566 [Pleasanton CA Garage Door Repair • Same-Day Service](https://mydoorteam.com/locations/california/pleasanton/?utm_source=gmb&utm_medium=location_pleasanton&utm_campaign=website#:~:text=Garage%20Maintenance,Garage%20Door%20Repair%20Specialists)

  * **Details:** Offers 24/7 emergency service and appointments from 8:00 AM to 10:00 PM (including weekends at no extra charge). Their trucks are fully stocked to fix most broken springs, cables, and openers in a single visit. [Pleasanton CA Garage Door Repair • Same-Day Service](https://mydoorteam.com/locations/california/pleasanton/?utm_source=gmb&utm_medium=location_pleasanton&utm_campaign=website#:~:text=Same%20Day%20Garage%20Door%20Repair,New%20Garage%20Door%20Installation)[Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton#:~:text=Garage%20Door%20Repair%20%26%20Service%20in,268%2D9267%20Book%20Online%20Now)

### 2\. Valiant Garage Door

  * **Phone:** (925) 409-4974 [Valiant Garage Door | Same-Day Repair, Springs & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/#:~:text=Free%20Estimate%20Instantly-,Gallery%20Moenave,4974%20Book%20Free%20Estimate%20Instantly)

  * **Details:** Local, founder-led company specializing in the Tri-Valley area. They provide after-hours emergency help and same-day repair for safety risks, overnight security issues, and snapped cables or springs. [Valiant Garage Door | Same-Day Repair, Springs & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/#:~:text=Valiant%20Trust%20System,10%2C000%2B%20Doors%20Serviced)[Valiant Garage Door | Same-Day Repair, Springs & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/#:~:text=Preventive%20service%20for%20noisy%20doors,Opener%20Installation%20%26%20Pricing)

### 3\. Magic Garage Door

  * **Phone:** (925) 800-4546 [Garage Door Opener Repair Pleasanton, CA | $29 Svc (925) 800-4546](https://garagedoormagicsf.com/garage-door-opener-repair-pleasanton#:~:text=Garage%20Door%20Opener%20Repair%20Pleasanton,door%2C%20contact%20Magic%20Garage%20Door.)

  * **Details:** Offers 24-hour emergency garage door and opener repair services in Pleasanton with a $29 service fee. [Garage Door Opener Repair Pleasanton, CA | $29 Svc (925) 800-4546](https://garagedoormagicsf.com/garage-door-opener-repair-pleasanton)

### 4\. Neighborhood Garage Door Service

  * **Phone:** (925) 418-7271 [Garage Door Repair in pleasanton|Call 925-418-7271](https://pleasanton.neighborhood-garage-door-service.com/#:~:text=We%20Accept%20All%20Major%20Credit,%2C%20CA%20925%2D418%2D7271)

  * **Details:** Located right in Pleasanton (Zip: 94588) and provides 24-hour emergency response for doors that are completely stuck or trapping your vehicle inside.

> ⚠️ **Safety Tip:** If your garage door has a broken torsion spring or has come completely off its tracks, **do not** try to pull the emergency release cord or force the door open manually. The door is incredibly heavy and can crash down without the counter-balance of the springs.

When you call, let them know if your car is trapped inside or if your garage is wide open to the street so they can prioritize your dispatch.

By the way, to unlock the full functionality of all Apps, enable [Gemini Apps Activity](https://myactivity.google.com/product/gemini).
